name: epam-indigo

metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for epam-indigo==1.25.0

documentation: Indigo is a universal molecular toolkit that can be used for molecular fingerprinting, substructure search, and molecular visualization. Also capable of performing a molecular similarity search, it is 100% open source and provides enhanced stereochemistry support for end users, as well as a documented API for developers.
